title: [eBay Plus] Kogan 43" LED 4K Smart AI Google TV $275 Delivered @ Kogan eBay
body:
Deal: [eBay Plus] Kogan 43" LED 4K Smart AI Google TV $275 Delivered @ Kogan eBay

[rhino86] AI powered recommendion. errrrrr crap. turn it off.
Tech Specs
Audio
Audio Output: 2 x10W
Dolby Audio: Yes
Connectivity
Bluetooth: Yes
Bluetooth Version: 5.1
Ethernet (RJ45): Yes
USB Media Playback: Yes
Wi-Fi: Yes
Wi-Fi Protocols: 2.4GHz & 5GHz
Dimensions
Distance Between Legs: 846.9mm
Stand Screw Size: ST4 x18mm
VESA Wall Mount Pattern: 200 x 200
Wall Mount Screw Size: M6 x 10mm
Weight: 5.9kg
With Stand: 956.5 x 199.6 x 584.8mm
Without Stand: 956.5 x 71.6 x 556.6mm
Display
Brightness: 250cd/m²
Contrast Ratio: 5000:1
Native Aspect Ratio: 16:9
Resolution: 3840 x 2160
Viewing Angle: 178° (H) / 178° (V)
Features
TV Features: Chromecast Built-in, Smart TV, VESA Mount Compatible, Google Assistant
TV Resolution: 4K UHD
TV Type: LED
Inputs
Composite (AV): 1
HDCP: 1 x 2.2
HDMI: 4 x 2.1

CPU: ARM CA55
GPU: Mali G52
RAM: 2GB

Tuning And Signal

Warranty
Manufacturer Warranty: 1 Year
[pw2002au] Hard to find a less than 50" TV at 4k without going oled. Most seen to be hd or fhd. Thanks for posting.
[jaboday423] Can anyone share if this is good for a work-from-home monitor?
[Raynes] It almost certainly is not. There's been plenty of other deals recently for good quality monitors at this price point
[Jollystacker] can get a good one easy with nice refresh rate and screen res for this price
[Jimothy Wongingtons] But just seductively cheap enough to think … maybe I should roll the dice again after I said no more…
[Mjk698] Nope I rather donate money than buy junk
[Mjk698] I got an older used Sony 40 inch for $50 off FB that is much better than this
[ReaperX22] Says it supports composite.. What about component?
Wondering if it's a half decent retro gaming TV via component on the cheap..
Probably has poor input latency etc at this price though.
[Cheap Rich Guy] No component and no RGB scart.
Retrotink 4K required for retro gaming.
